creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/magit 1.2.0 fails to build with emacs 24.4.

There are many errors like this:
gmake[2]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/devel/magit/work/magit-1.2.0'
/usr/local/bin/emacs-24.4  -batch -q -no-site-file -eval "(setq load-path (cons (expand-file-name \".\") load-path))" --eval '(byte-compile-file "magit.el")'

In toplevel form:
magit.el:93:30:Warning: Package iswitchb is obsolete!
magit.el:792:27:Error: Wrong type argument: listp, 769

The 1.2.1 release was made specifically to make it work with Emacs 24.4.
